recurring_credits.name: Bilt Travel Hotel Credit
recurring_credits.description: $200 per half (2 × $200/year = $400 total) usable in Bilt's travel portal. Minimum 2-night stay required.
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: $400 credit that can be used to book hotels through Bilt's travel portal... issued semi-annually, in two $200 increments

recurring_credits.name: Bilt Cash
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: $200 of Bilt Cash, both of which are renewed annually

_excluded: Priority Pass lounge access (non-quantified benefit per OpenCard schema rules)
Bilt Gold status from welcome offer (one-time)
